name: WHO-5
description: The WHO-5 is a brief questionnaire for assessing general well-being. It was developed by the World Health Organization and is one of the most widely used instruments worldwide for measuring subjective well-being.

intro.title: Assess Your Well-being
intro.description: This brief questionnaire measures your general well-being over the last two weeks. It was developed by the WHO and consists of only 5 simple questions.
intro.researchNote: Your regular participation helps detect changes in well-being early and advance research.

cheerful.text: I have felt cheerful and in good spirits.

5.label: All of the time
5.description: Constantly over the last two weeks

3.label: More than half of the time

2.label: Less than half of the time

0.label: At no time
0.description: Never in the last two weeks

interpretations.description: Your responses suggest significantly reduced well-being.
